mascot_message: Hi! I've updated our Community rules. We are now Open Source , so the rules have changed slightly (added protection for design and API). Please read and confirm them! (´• ω •`)
text:
USER AGREEMENT AND PRIVACY POLICY: CL (Clegendary Launcher)

1. GENERAL PROVISIONS AND OPEN SOURCE
This Agreement governs the relationship between the user and the developers of CL (Clegendary Launcher). By installing the software, you agree to the terms of this Agreement.

Age Restrictions: By using the software, you confirm that you have reached the age required to independently accept the terms of this Agreement according to your country's laws, or that you have permission from your parents/guardians.

License: CL is open-source software. The project logic and code are distributed under the terms of the GNU General Public License v3.0 (GPLv3).

Permissions: You have the right to study, modify, and distribute the code in accordance with the terms of this license.

2. PROTECTION OF TRADEMARK, DESIGN, AND API
We use a hybrid licensing model. While the code is open, the Visual Style and Access Keys are not.

Trade Dress: The name "CL (Clegendary Launcher)", logos, icons, background images, and unique interface elements are the property of the developers and are NOT covered by the GPLv3 license.

Rules for Forks: If you create your own version (fork) of the launcher, you MUST: 

Change the program name and completely replace all graphic resources (branding) with your own.

Use your own API keys (Client IDs/API Keys) for services like Microsoft, CurseForge, and others.

Prohibitions: Using the original CL project's keys in derivative products is strictly prohibited.

3. PRIVACY, DATA COLLECTION, AND UPDATES
We respect your privacy. The launcher operates on the principle of data minimization.

Local Data: Your authorization tokens, settings, and logs are stored only on your device.

Updates: The program may automatically send anonymous technical requests to our servers to check for and download updates to ensure security and stability.

We DO NOT collect: Passwords, personal files, or browsing history.

4. THIRD-PARTY SERVICES AND CONTENT
The launcher interacts with third-party services: Microsoft (Xbox Live), Mojang Studios, CurseForge, Modrinth, and LittleSkin. By using them, you agree to their respective terms.

Modifications: The launcher only provides technical access to mod catalogs. We are not the authors of the modifications, resource packs, or modpacks you download, and we do not perform pre-moderation.

5. DISCLAIMER
The software is provided "AS IS", without any warranties. The project is in active development.
The developers are not responsible for:

Any damages, data loss, or equipment malfunctions.

Incorrect operation of third-party mods, servers, or skins.

Account Bans: We are not responsible for any sanctions (bans, access restrictions) applied to your game account by server administrators or Mojang/Microsoft resulting from the use of this software, mods, or cheats.

Risk: You use this software at your own risk.

6. NO AFFILIATION WITH MOJANG/MICROSOFT
CL (Clegendary Launcher) is an independent development and is NOT an official product of Mojang Studios or Microsoft Corporation. We urge you to use a licensed copy of Minecraft.

7. CHANGES AND CONTACTS
This agreement may be updated by the developer. Continued use of the Launcher constitutes your consent to the new terms.

Contact (Discord): clegendary
